name: PT Danasupra Erapacific Tbk
summary: PT Danasupra Erapacific Tbk engages in leasing, factoring, and consumer financing activities in Indonesia. It offers financing for the purchase of used cars and new cars, pickups, trucks, and buses; housing facilities, home stores, home offices, condominiums/apartments, and small offices; and capital goods, such as heavy equipment for mining, plantation, forestry, barge, tugboat, and production machinery, as well as for various purposes, such as marriage, home renovation, travel, worship, education, and other consumption purposes. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
